title: Turkish Meat Kofte
description: A flavorful and textured Turkish dish featuring meat kofte, served with a side of piquant sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat the pan to medium-high heat.
2. Using your hands, mix ground meat, icli pepper paste, Turkish spices, salt, black pepper, and breadcrumbs in a bowl.
3. Gradually add chopped onion and continue mixing until everything is well combined.
4. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small meat kofte (about 1 1/2 inches in diameter).
5. Add a small amount of oil to the preheated pan and sear the meat kofte until browned on all sides.
6. Transfer the kofte to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes.
7. Serve hot with a side of piquant sauce, if desired.
